name: Gaslight
description:
Per-player map perception. Split players onto individual copies of a page with tokens synchronized via Anchor. Each player can see different things (different token art, names, hidden tokens) while token movement stays consistent across all copies.

Use cases: illusions, shapechangers, stealth/perception, madness/hallucinations, secrets.

Commands:
- `!gaslight split <group>` -- Activate a gaslight group (test-first)
- `!gaslight merge [group]` -- Tear down links, return players
- `!gaslight test <group>` -- Dry-run linking resolution
- `!gaslight link [name|new] [ids...]` -- Manually link tokens
- `!gaslight unlink [ids...]` -- Remove links
- `!gaslight group <group> <player|GM>` -- Assign page to group
- `!gaslight ungroup <group> <player|GM|--all>` -- Remove page from group
- `!gaslight status` -- Show current state
- `!gaslight --help` -- Command reference
